category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and garden electric or cordless power tools exported from China to South Africa, compared against NRCS Letter of Authority obligations, SANS IEC 62841 electrical safety, ICASA radio approval for cordless tools, SANS 941 energy labelling, and restricted-substance and battery handling.

title.en: China-to-South Africa Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入南非：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入南非：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against South African requirements: NRCS Letter of Authority where a Compulsory Specification applies, SANS IEC 62841 electrical safety, ICASA radio approval for cordless tools, SANS 941 energy labelling, and restricted-substance and battery handling.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与南非要求差距对照：适用强制规范时的 NRCS 授权函、SANS IEC 62841 电气安全、无绳工具的 ICASA 无线电批准、SANS 941 能效标签，以及限用物质与电池处理。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與南非要求差距對照：適用強制規範時的 NRCS 授權函、SANS IEC 62841 電氣安全、無繩工具的 ICASA 無線電批准、SANS 941 能效標籤，以及限用物質與電池處理。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NRCS Letter of Authority determination, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current South African law, Compulsory Specifications, SANS standards, ICASA type approval, energy labelling, and enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NRCS 授权函裁定、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行南非法律、强制规范、SANS 标准、ICASA 型号批准、能效标签及执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NRCS 授權函裁定、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行南非法律、強制規範、SANS 標準、ICASA 型號批准、能效標籤及執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering South Africa, the baseline is electrical safety to SANS IEC 62841 (South Africa adopts the IEC series via SABS), an NRCS Letter of Authority where the tool falls under a Compulsory Specification, ICASA type approval for the radio function of cordless tools, and SANS 941 energy labelling where applicable; an in-country importer of record is required and goods commonly clear through Durban or Cape Town.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入南非，基线是按 SANS IEC 62841 完成电气安全（南非通过 SABS 采用 IEC 系列）、在工具受强制规范管辖时取得 NRCS 授权函、无绳工具无线电功能取得 ICASA 型号批准，以及适用时的 SANS 941 能效标签；需要在地进口商作为进口主体，货物通常经德班或开普敦清关。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入南非，基線是按 SANS IEC 62841 完成電氣安全（南非透過 SABS 採用 IEC 系列）、在工具受強制規範管轄時取得 NRCS 授權函、無繩工具無線電功能取得 ICASA 型號批准，以及適用時的 SANS 941 能效標籤；需要在地進口商作為進口主體，貨物通常經德班或開普敦清關。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on change of a cited Compulsory Specification, SANS standard, ICASA regulation, or energy-labelling rule.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, customs, or primary legal sources preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
